works.title: Works

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.welcome: Hi! I'm the site owner's AI assistant. Ask me anything about his works and skills.
ai.preset1: What are your most representative projects?
ai.preset2: What tech stack do you use?
ai.preset3: What problem does the Engineering Toolbox solve?
ai.fallback: AI assistant is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later or browse the works directly.
ai.timeout: Response timed out. Please simplify your question and try again.
ai.offTopic: Sorry, I can only answer questions about the site owner's works and projects. Try asking about his tech stack or project experience.
ai.noInfo: Sorry, I don't have information about this topic yet. Try browsing the works page for more details.
ai.disclaimer: Generated from project knowledge base · May not include latest updates
ai.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
